name: ts_monthly_electricity_by_state
description: Monthly electricity grouped by state (CO only), upgrade 0 baseline.

name: ts_monthly_two_fuels_by_building_type
description: Monthly electricity + natural gas grouped by building type and time, CO only.

name: ts_year_collapse_electricity
description: Year-collapsed timeseries electricity, grouped by building type, CO only.

name: ts_15min_raw_electricity_by_state
description: Raw 15-min cadence timeseries (no timestamp_grouping_func), CO only. Exercises the un-aggregated time-axis code path that example notebooks rely on.

name: ts_daily_electricity_by_state
description: Daily-grouped timeseries electricity, CO only. Exercises date_trunc('day', ...) plus the rows_per_sample / distinct-bs-keys grouping_metrics branch.

name: ts_hourly_electricity_by_building_type
description: Hourly-grouped timeseries electricity, CO + single building type. Exercises date_trunc('hour', ...) — the smallest grouping_func granularity.
